Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class MobileApplicationDetail

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MobileApplicationDetail
public class MobileApplicationDetail extends Metadata

Java class for MobileApplicationDetail complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MobileApplicationDetail">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="applicationBinaryFile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationBinaryFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationBundleIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationFileLength" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationIconFile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationIconFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="applicationInstallUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="devicePlatform" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DevicePlatformType"/>
         <element name="deviceType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="minimumOsVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="privateApp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="version" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
